meta.title: NOXIOAI — AI employees for your business
meta.description: NOXIOAI is a visual online office of AI employees: marketing, social media, customer support and development — run your business from one screen. Coming soon; join the waitlist.

hero.subtitle: NOXIOAI is a visual online office: named AI employees with real personalities who handle your marketing, social media, customer support and web/app development — for businesses anywhere.

team.heading: Meet your team
team.sub: Every employee is a specialist with their own personality — all at desks in your office.

kian.name: Kian
kian.desc: Finds qualified leads and writes outreach that sounds like you — nothing goes out without your approval.

nika.name: Nika
nika.desc: Campaigns, copy and SEO content — Nika builds your brand.

dara.name: Dara
dara.desc: Technical guidance for your site and app, from idea to code — Dara has your back.

sara.name: Sara
sara.desc: Ready-to-send replies in a perfect professional tone — customers keep coming back.

avisa.name: Avisa
avisa.desc: Instagram & Telegram posts, captions and content calendars — always on time.

office.title: A visual office
office.desc: See your employees in a living pixel office — every desk is a specialist.

brain.title: Business Brain
brain.desc: Describe your business once; every employee knows it and works in your tone.

persian.title: Truly multilingual
persian.desc: Natural language in English, Persian, Turkish and Arabic — with full right-to-left support, not machine translation.

channels.title: Instagram & Telegram
channels.desc: Built for the channels Iranian businesses actually use.

one.title: Introduce your business
one.desc: A few minutes about what you do — this becomes your team's Brain.

two.title: Pick your employees
two.desc: Nika, Dara, Sara and more — seat whoever you need at a desk.

three.title: Delegate the work
three.desc: Content, customer replies, technical guidance — from one screen.

one.q: What exactly do the AI employees do?
one.a: Each employee has a specialty: Nika creates marketing content and campaigns, Sara drafts customer replies, Dara gives technical guidance for your site and app, and Avisa plans Instagram & Telegram content. You give the final approval — you're always in control.

two.q: Is the writing actually natural, or machine translation?
two.a: NOXIOAI is built multilingual from the ground up — English, Persian, Turkish and Arabic, with correct right-to-left rendering. Natural tone in every language, not a translated afterthought.

three.a: V1 is in active development. Waitlist members get invited first — leave your email to hold your place.

four.a: Pricing is in EUR and sized for small businesses. Founding Members lock 50% off for life.

waitlist.heading: Get in before everyone else
waitlist.sub: V1 is on its way. Leave your email to hear first — no spam, ever.
waitlist.success: You're in! Good news coming soon. 🎉

pricing.sub: The first 10 customers get 50% off — for life — plus personal onboarding. When the spots are gone, they're gone.
pricing.note: Prices in EUR. Your founder rate stays locked as long as you're subscribed.

meta.title: Privacy Policy — NOXIOAI
meta.description: How NOXIOAI collects, uses, stores and protects personal data, and the rights available to you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: NOXIOAI is the controller of the personal data described in this policy. We collect only what we need to provide and improve our AI software and automation services.

data.title: Data we collect
data.body: The information we collect depends on how you interact with NOXIOAI.

waitlist.label: Waitlist
waitlist.text: Your email address when you ask to receive product news or an invitation.

account.label: Accounts
account.text: Your name and email address, plus a securely hashed version of your password. We do not store your password in readable form.

payments.label: Payments
payments.text: Stripe customer and subscription IDs, billing status and limited transaction metadata. Card details go directly to Stripe; NOXIOAI never receives or stores card numbers.

analytics.label: Analytics & cookies
analytics.text: Basic device and browser information, approximate location derived from an IP address, visited pages, product events and cookie identifiers. Essential cookies keep the service working; optional analytics are used only where permitted or consented to.

purpose.title: Why we use it
purpose.body: We use personal data only for defined business and service purposes.

provide.label: Provide the service
provide.text: Create and maintain accounts, deliver software features and carry out requested automation services.

communicate.label: Communicate
communicate.text: Send waitlist updates, transactional messages, service notices and replies to support requests.

payments.label: Manage payments
payments.text: Start, administer and confirm subscriptions and other purchases.

security.label: Protect NOXIOAI
security.text: Authenticate users, prevent abuse, investigate incidents and keep the service reliable.

improve.label: Improve the product
improve.text: Understand aggregate usage and identify where performance and user experience can be improved.

basis.title: Legal bases
basis.body: Under the GDPR, our processing relies on the legal basis that fits each use.

consent.label: Consent
consent.text: For waitlist marketing and optional analytics or cookies. You may withdraw consent at any time.

contract.label: Contract
contract.text: To create your account, provide purchased services and administer your subscription.

legitimate.label: Legitimate interests
legitimate.text: To secure, operate and improve NOXIOAI where those interests are not overridden by your rights and freedoms.

obligation.label: Legal obligation
obligation.text: To meet accounting, tax, fraud-prevention and other duties that apply to us.

retention.title: How long we keep data
retention.body: We keep personal data only for as long as its purpose and applicable law require, then delete or anonymise it.

waitlist.label: Waitlist data
waitlist.text: Until you unsubscribe, withdraw consent, or the waitlist purpose has ended.

account.label: Account data
account.text: While your account is active and for a limited period afterwards for security, disputes and backup rotation.

payments.label: Payment records
payments.text: For the period required by Polish and EU accounting, tax and legal obligations.

analytics.label: Analytics data
analytics.text: According to the shortest practical period configured for the analytics service, after which it is deleted or aggregated.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Depending on the circumstances, the GDPR gives you the following rights. We may need to verify your identity before completing a request.

access.label: Access
access.text: Ask whether we process your data and receive a copy of it.

rectify.label: Rectification
rectify.text: Correct personal data that is inaccurate or incomplete.

erase.label: Erasure
erase.text: Ask us to delete data when there is no lawful reason to keep it.

restrict.label: Restriction
restrict.text: Ask us to limit processing in specific circumstances.

portability.label: Portability
portability.text: Receive eligible data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.

object.label: Objection
object.text: Object to processing based on legitimate interests or to direct marketing.

withdraw.label: Withdraw consent
withdraw.text: Withdraw consent at any time without affecting processing that was lawful before withdrawal.

complain.label: Complaint
complain.text: Lodge a complaint with Poland's Personal Data Protection Office (UODO) or the supervisory authority where you live or work.

processors.title: Processors & infrastructure
processors.body: We share data only with providers that help us run NOXIOAI, under appropriate data-protection terms.

vercel.label: Vercel
vercel.text: Website and application hosting and delivery.

cloudflare.label: Cloudflare
cloudflare.text: Network delivery, DNS, security and abuse protection.

stripe.label: Stripe
stripe.text: Payment and subscription processing. Stripe receives payment details directly.

resend.label: Resend
resend.text: Waitlist, account and transactional email delivery.

database.label: Postgres in Germany
database.text: Our core service data is stored in a self-hosted Postgres database on a VPS located in Germany.

transfers.title: International transfers
transfers.body: Some providers may process data outside the European Economic Area. When they do, we rely on a European Commission adequacy decision or appropriate safeguards such as the European Commission's Standard Contractual Clauses. You may contact us for more information about the safeguards used.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: To exercise a privacy right or ask a question about this policy, contact NOXIOAI at:

meta.title: Terms of Service — NOXIOAI
meta.description: The terms that apply when you use NOXIOAI software, subscriptions and done-for-you automation services.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These terms govern your use of NOXIOAI's AI automation software, subscriptions and done-for-you automation services.

acceptance.title: Acceptance
acceptance.body: By accessing or using NOXIOAI, creating an account or purchasing a service, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service. Additional written terms may apply to a specific done-for-you project; if they conflict, those project terms control for that project.

service.title: What we provide
service.body: NOXIOAI offers software and professional services designed to help businesses automate work. Features may evolve as the product develops.

software.label: AI automation software
software.text: Tools and AI employees that generate, organise or automate business work. You remain responsible for reviewing outputs and approving actions.

services.label: Done-for-you services
services.text: Custom automation design, setup, integration, maintenance and related consulting agreed in a proposal or order.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.body: You are responsible for activity performed through your account.

accurate.label: Accurate information
accurate.text: Provide current, complete information and keep it updated.

security.label: Account security
security.text: Keep credentials confidential and notify us promptly if you suspect unauthorised access.

eligibility.label: Authority
eligibility.text: You must be legally able to enter this agreement. If you act for an organisation, you confirm that you can bind it to these terms.

acceptable.title: Acceptable use
acceptable.body: Use NOXIOAI lawfully and in a way that does not harm people, systems or the service.

law.label: No unlawful use
law.text: Do not use the service for fraud, harassment, unlawful surveillance, discrimination, spam or content that violates applicable law.

abuse.label: No harmful automation
abuse.text: Do not submit malware, overload the service, scrape it abusively or automate actions that you are not authorised to perform.

security.label: No security interference
security.text: Do not bypass safeguards, probe vulnerabilities without written permission or attempt to access another user's data.

rights.label: Respect rights
rights.text: Only provide data and content you are entitled to use, and respect privacy, intellectual-property and third-party rights.

payments.title: Payments & subscriptions
payments.body: Payments are processed by Stripe. Prices, billing frequency and included services are shown at purchase or in your proposal.

billing.label: Billing
billing.text: You authorise Stripe to charge the selected payment method for amounts due. We do not store card numbers.

renewal.label: Renewal
renewal.text: Recurring subscriptions renew automatically for the stated billing period until cancelled.

cancel.label: Cancellation
cancel.text: You may cancel a subscription before its next renewal. Access continues through the paid period unless stated otherwise.

refunds.label: Refunds
refunds.text: If you believe a refund is appropriate, contact us. We review requests individually, without limiting any mandatory consumer rights.

taxes.label: Taxes
taxes.text: Prices may exclude taxes unless stated otherwise. You are responsible for taxes that legally apply to your purchase.

ownership.title: Ownership & customer content
ownership.body: Each party keeps ownership of what it brings to the relationship.

noxioai.label: NOXIOAI
noxioai.text: We own the service, software, brand, interfaces and underlying technology, excluding customer content and third-party materials.

customer.label: Your content
customer.text: You retain ownership of content and data you provide. You grant us the limited permission needed to process it and deliver the service.

availability.title: Service provided “as is”
availability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, NOXIOAI is provided “as is” and “as available.” We do not promise uninterrupted operation or that AI output will always be accurate or suitable for a specific purpose. You must review important outputs before relying on or sending them. This does not affect guarantees or rights that cannot legally be excluded.

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.body: To the fullest extent permitted by law, NOXIOAI is not liable for indirect, incidental, special or consequential loss, lost profit, lost revenue or lost data. Our total liability relating to the service is limited to the amount you paid NOXIOAI during the 12 months before the event giving rise to the claim. Nothing in these terms excludes liability for fraud, wilful misconduct, death or personal injury, or any liability that cannot be limited under applicable law.

termination.title: Termination
termination.body: You may stop using NOXIOAI at any time and cancel recurring subscriptions as described above. We may suspend or terminate access for a material breach, unlawful use, security risk or non-payment, with notice where reasonably possible. On termination, your right to use the service ends; accrued payment obligations and terms that by nature should survive remain in effect.

law.title: Governing law
law.body: These terms are governed by the laws of Poland and applicable European Union law. Disputes are subject to the competent courts in Poland, except where mandatory consumer law gives you the right to use another law or forum. Your non-waivable consumer rights remain unaffected.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms as NOXIOAI, the law or our business changes. We will post the updated terms and revise the date above. For material changes, we will provide reasonable notice where practical. Continued use after the new terms take effect means you accept them; if you do not, you should stop using the service.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.body: Questions, cancellation issues and refund requests can be sent to NOXIOAI at:

meta.title: About NOXIOAI — AI employees for small business
meta.description: NOXIOAI builds thoughtful AI employees that give small businesses an always-on team.

about.title: AI employees that work while you sleep.
about.intro: We are building an always-on team for the businesses that have never had one.

story.title: Built for real work
story.body: NOXIOAI turns practical automation into AI employees you can understand, direct and trust with the repetitive work behind a growing business.

founder.title: Founder-led by design
founder.body: We stay close to the product and the people using it. Every workflow is shaped with care, restraint and a premium-tech standard—useful before impressive.

mission.title: The mission
mission.body: Give small businesses an always-on team: capable when the day is busy, dependable after the office closes and always under the owner's control.
